creator: linimon@FreeBSD.org
text:
State Changed
From-To: open->closed

To submitter: I'm sorry, but given your PR, I can't tell which other 
PR it was meant to be a followup to.  In addition, the formatting is 
sufficiently broken as to be very difficult to read. 

Please try to submit another followup to the PR you intended, with a 
Subject: line beginning with "Re: kern/999999: " (exactly that format, 
but with the correct number), and without all the CRs escaped.
